summary: Auth and Leaderboard features fully tested. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Sign In button visible, Leaderboard modal with period filters (Today/This Week/All Time) and sort options (Most Wins/Fewest Steps/Fastest Time) working correctly. Empty state message displays properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - proper async/await usage, clean separation of auth and game logic
Auth flow correctly uses Emergent Auth with session_id exchange pattern
Leaderboard aggregation pipelines properly handle daily/weekly/all-time periods
Game result submission correctly requires authentication via require_auth helper
User stats (games_played, games_won, best_steps, best_time) properly updated on game results
data-testid attributes properly added: login-btn, leaderboard-btn, period-{key}, sort-{key}, user-menu-trigger, user-menu-dropdown
seed_data_creation: None needed - testing uses existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth and Leaderboard features fully tested. Google OAuth via Emergent Auth working (redirects to auth.emergentagent.com). Leaderboard modal tested with all period filters (daily/weekly/all) and sort options (wins/steps/time). Empty state message shows 'No games recorded yet for this period. Be the first to make the leaderboard!'. Game result submission requires authentication (returns 401 without session). User rank and history endpoints working.

homepage_sign_in_button.description: Sign In button visible and clickable, redirects to Emergent Auth

leaderboard_empty_state.message: No games recorded yet for this period. Be the first to make the leaderboard!
